title: Machu Picchu is completed
subtitle: Inca citadel in the Peruvian Andes and UNESCO World Heritage Site
fact: Machu Picchu is a 15th-century Inca citadel located in the Eastern Cordillera of southern Peru on a mountain ridge at 2,430 meters (7,970 ft).

title: Al-Aqsa Mosque is completed
subtitle: The main prayer hall of the Al-Aqsa mosque compound in Jerusalem
fact: The Aqsa Mosque, also known as the Qibli Mosque or Qibli Chapel, is the main congregational mosque or prayer hall in the Al-Aqsa mosque compound in the Old City of Jerusalem.

title: Church of the Holy Sepulchre is completed
subtitle: Church in Jerusalem, containing the two holiest sites in Christianity
fact: The Church of the Holy Sepulchre, also known as the Church of the Resurrection, is a fourth-century church in the Christian Quarter of the Old City of Jerusalem.

title: Dome of the Rock is completed
subtitle: Islamic building in Al-Aqsa, Jerusalem
fact: The Dome of the Rock is an octagonal Islamic shrine at the center of the Al-Aqsa mosque compound on the Temple Mount in the Old City of Jerusalem.

title: Hagia Sophia is completed
subtitle: Mosque, museum, and former church in Istanbul, Turkey
fact: Hagia Sophia, officially the Hagia Sophia Grand Mosque, is a mosque and a major cultural and historical site in Istanbul, Turkey.

title: Angkor Wat is completed
subtitle: Buddhist temple complex in Cambodia
fact: Angkor Wat is a Theravada Buddhist temple complex and the largest religious complex in the world.

title: Windsor Castle is completed
subtitle: Royal residence at Windsor in Berkshire, England, UK
fact: Windsor Castle is a royal residence at Windsor in the English county of Berkshire, about 25 miles (40 km) west of central London.

title: Tower of London is completed
subtitle: Castle in central London, United Kingdom
fact: The Tower of London, officially His Majesty's Royal Palace and Fortress of the Tower of London, is a historic citadel and castle on the north bank of the River Thames in London, England.

title: Alhambra is completed
subtitle: Palace and fortress complex in Granada, Andalusia, Spain
fact: The Alhambra is a palace and fortress complex located in Granada, Spain.
